channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Après le Prime Day, Amazon brade un tas de produits Tech pour la 2e démarque des soldes
item.description: Alors que la deuxième démarque des soldes d'été vient de sonner, Amazon prend le relais des festivités après son célèbre Prime Day. Le géant du e-commerce frappe fort en dévoilant une nouvelle vague d'offres particulièrement alléchantes sur tout son rayon Tech.

item.title: Nous avons testé le 8BitDo Arcade Controller Signature Edition : la meilleure version d’un excellent pad ?
item.description: Un an après son premier Arcade Controller leverless, 8BitDo en décline une édition signature à la robe violette translucide, co-signée par les pros de la baston Vxbao et Zhen. Sous la coque, un seul vrai changement face au modèle standard : des switches Kailh Purple Glede taillés pour le jeu de combat. On a confronté cette version à la N Edition d'origine pour voir si le jeu en vaut la chandelle. ...

item.title: Watching England vs. DR Congo from home? Win tickets to the World Cup Final with this giveaway — save $1000s and see the trophy lifted live!
item.description: Access to the quarterfinals, semifinals, and final of the FIFA World Cup 2026 is on the line

item.title: Comcast’s split could make or break Peacock
item.description: NBCUniversal executives are about to find out whether Peacock will sink or swim in the streaming industry. Now that Comcast is planning to split NBCUniversal, Peacock, and Sky from its broadband and wireless businesses, Peacock will be forced to stand on its own - without the backing of a combined company that pulled in more […]

item.title: ‘It tracked flawlessly across every surface I tested’ — this Logitech productivity and gaming mouse I reviewed is almost as good as my all time fave, thanks to its sky-high 30,000 DPI and 8,000Hz polling rate
item.description: An ergonomic wireless mouse packing 8,000Hz polling, a PixArt sensor, silent switches, and tri-mode connectivity for under $70? The Keychron M6 8K is strong on the value front and challenges staples of the genre.

item.title: Google Fitbit Air : le firmware reçoit sa première mise à jour, pour quels changements ?
item.description: Sans compter la mise à jour obligatoire lors de la configuration initiale du bracelet, le Fitbit Air de Google déploie une nouvelle version de son firmware. Voyons ce qu'elle apporte.

item.title: Unistellar brade ses télescopes connectés pendant les soldes d’été
item.description: Compact et bourré de technologies, le télescope connecté Unistellar Odyssey Pro est par exemple en promotion sur la site officiel de la marque : on le trouve avec 15 % de remise, ainsi que d'autres références du catalogue.

item.title: « Ce n’était pas pour gagner de l’argent » : pourquoi l’ancien patron de Sony voulait des jeux PlayStation sur PC
item.description: Sony ne sortira plus ses jeux sur ordinateur, mettant fin à l'initiative lancée par Shawn Layden, ancien président de Sony Interactive Entertainment Worldwide Studios. Il revient sur ce qui a motivé sa décision à l'époque.

item.title: Geekom's ultra-portable Apple MacBook Pro rival promises Core Ultra 9 performance and up to 24 hours of battery life — and it's just $827 with our exclusive code
item.description: Built for programmers, data analysts, creators, and professionals, the GeekBook M16 laptop comes with Windows 11 Pro.

item.title: VPN Super hits the living room, and your smart TV's data habits are the target
item.description: VPN Super has launched beta apps for Apple TV and Android TV, adding encryption, location flexibility, and a privacy layer to the big screen.

item.title: Microsoft just made a huge Linux move that developers and container fans everywhere will love
item.description: You can now finally run Linux containers in Windows – without third-party tools.

item.title: The best Switch 2 case I’ve tried is cheaper than usual
item.description: Dbrand apparently knows how to really whiff a product launch, as we recently saw with the Steam Machine Companion Cube shell. But it also makes the best case out there for the Nintendo Switch 2, which happens to be discounted right now. The Killswitch 2 is versatile, with better build quality than other similar models, […]

item.title: Sony is killing discs — and showing us why it’s a terrible idea
item.description: The future of video game preservation just took a major hit. This morning, Sony announced that, starting in January 2028, the company will no longer produce physical PlayStation discs, which means that from that moment on you can only purchase new PS5 games digitally. At the same time, Sony also announced that it's going to […]

item.title: 'Pure old-school Windows': Ex-Microsoft engineer shrinks down Notepad to 2.5 kilobytes with 'no bloat, no telemetry, no nonsense'
item.description: Want Notepad to be like it was in the Windows XP era — except even leaner? TinyRetroPad is here.

item.title: A giant planet beat the odds and actually got hotter after its star died
item.description: NASA's James Webb Space Telescope reveals the first atmosphere of an exoplanet orbiting a white dwarf, offering unexpected results.

item.title: What todays creators want aspiring creators to know
item.description: Take a behind-the-scenes look at the creator interviews and moments that defined Mashable's VidCon 2026 coverage.

item.title: How to watch England vs. DR Congo online for free
item.description: How to watch World Cup for free. Live stream England vs. DR Congo in the 2026 FIFA World Cup for free from anywhere in the world.

item.title: I tried ChatGPT's new finance feature — and it opened a new window into how I spend my money
item.description: ChatGPT’s finance feature turns personal spending data into a simple conversation.

item.title: Best Buy launches its mega 4th of July sale — get up to 45% off appliances, TVs, laptops, headphones, and more
item.description: The Best Buy 4th of July sale is now underway, so I've searched through the event and picked out all of the best deals available on TVs, appliances, laptops, headphones, and more.

item.title: Restaurants can now accept orders placed directly from ChatGPT and Claude thanks to Square's new, low-fee, no setup integration
item.description: Square is launching a new ChatGPT app and Claude plugin, enabling consumers to discover restaurants and seamlessly place orders directly within these AI platforms — and allowing restaurants, in turn, to accept orders from users and their AI agents without any technical capabilities. Even more helpfully for businesses, Square is processing these AI-driven transactions without charging the traditional marketplace commission fees that have historically squeezed the food and beverage sector.However, Square is still charging its typical online ordering fees of 3.3% plus $0.30 or 2.9% plus $0.30 per...

item.title: Why human-centric displays matter in the screen-first workplace
item.description: How smarter, more user-focused display technology can better support work and play.

item.title: Hurry: The MacBook Neo is still just $599 at Walmart
item.description: Apple just raised the MacBook Neo's price by $100. But as of July 1, Walmart still has it in stock at its original MSRP of $599.

item.title: Venice AI becomes a unicorn with $65M Series A as its privacy-first AI platform takes off
item.description: Venice AI is already profitable, with annualized run-rate revenues of over $70 million, CEO Erik Voorhees said.

item.title: The Marshall Acton III speaker is sitting at a record-low price at Amazon — save over $100
item.description: The Marshall Acton III speaker is on sale at Amazon for $179.99, down from the list price of $299.99. That's a 40% discount.

item.title: Gemini Spark, Google’s agentic assistant, is now available on Mac
item.description: Google's 24/7 agentic assistant, Gemini Spark, comes to Mac alongside other improvements, like real-time tracking and support for more apps.

item.title: The Odyssey trailer gives us our best look yet at Zendayas Athena
item.description: "The Odyssey," out July 17, stars Matt Damon as Odysseus, Tom Holland as Telemachus, Zendaya as Athena, Anne Hathaway as Penelope, and more.

item.title: Tidy up in a flash with half off the Shark Rocket Ultra-Light Corded Stick Vacuum
item.description: As of July 1, get 50% off the Shark Rocket Ultra-Light Corded Stick Vacuum at Amazon.

item.title: Sony to end physical PlayStation game disc production in 2028
item.description: Sony will stop producing physical discs for all new PlayStation games beginning in 2028, as the company embraces an all-digital future.

item.title: Smartphones Xiaomi : quel modèle Redmi, Poco ou Xiaomi choisir en 2026 ?
item.description: La marque chinoise Xiaomi dispose d'un vaste catalogue et sort régulièrement de nouveaux produits. Pour savoir quel Xiaomi choisir, nous avons testé et sélectionné les meilleures références parmi les meilleurs smartphones Xiaomi, Redmi et Poco disponibles sur le marché.

item.title: BMW iX5 : pourquoi la marque allemande a osé une batterie démesurée de 140 kWh
item.description: Le constructeur BMW repousse les limites avec son nouveau BMW iX5, un SUV électrique massif abritant la plus grande batterie du marché européen. On vous présente en images ce colosse de 140 kWh pensé pour franchir les 845 kilomètres d'autonomie d'une seule traite.

item.title: The LG gram 15-inch Copilot+ laptop is down to best-ever price — buy for $250 off at Amazon
item.description: The LG gram 15-inch Copilot+ laptop is on sale at Amazon for $1,199.99, down from $1,449.99. That's a 17% discount or $250 savings.

item.title: Claude Sonnet 5 is here, and the 'most agentic Sonnet model yet' shows that the AI war is shifting from chat to agents
item.description: Anthropic has released Claude Sonnet 5, a new AI model that's built to act more like an agent than a simple chatbot.

item.title: 7 ways the Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra turns your next festival into content worth posting
item.description: You deserve better festival footage than blurry silhouettes and shaky clips. Here's how the Galaxy S26 Ultra's camera and AI features can enhance the experience, from opener to encore.

item.title: The developer device is the new supply chain attack blind spot
item.description: Trusted developer tools are becoming the new path into enterprise software environments.

item.title: Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 8 specs and cases leaks fill the gaps in Samsung's new teaser — and there could be one disappointing omission
item.description: The Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 8 could have lots of power but just two rear cameras and no Privacy Display.

item.title: Builders Stage agenda revealed: Practical strategies for scaling startups at TechCrunch Disrupt 2026
item.description: The Builders Stage is returning to TechCrunch Disrupt 2026, bringing together 10,000+ founders, startup operators, and investors for practical conversations. and Q&A on what it takes to build and scale successful companies. Register now to save up to $330.

item.title: Ce PC portable taillé pour le gaming (RTX 5090, Intel Core Ultra 9, 32 Go de RAM) s’allège de 650 euros lors des soldes
item.description: En pleine inflation des composants pour PC, le HP Omen 16-ah0018nf équipé de l'Intel Core Ultra 9 et de 32 Go de RAM profite d'une réduction d'E.Leclerc pour chuter à 3 649 euros.

item.title: Console PlayStation | Les nouveaux jeux ne seront plus sur disques à partir de 2028
item.description: Sony ne produira plus de disques physiques pour les nouveaux jeux vidéo sortant sur ses consoles PlayStation à partir de janvier 2028 et les distribuera seulement en version dématérialisée, a annoncé le groupe japonais mercredi dans un billet de blogue.

item.title: $169 GMKtek N5095 mini PC is a brave but desperate attempt to revive a PC market decimated by AI and RAM greed
item.description: Popular mini PC vendor debuts a new GMKtec G5S model based on obsolete tech in a bid to reduce price.

item.title: Fin des jeux PlayStation en disque en 2028 : les 3 questions qui pèsent sur la PS6
item.description: C'est confirmé : PlayStation arrête la production des jeux en version disque à partir de janvier 2028. L'annonce suscite son lot de questions pour la future PS6 et notamment, son système de rétrocompatibilité.
